name: @ronaldjdevfs/forge
description: Forge — Architecture Operating System for backend systems. Arquitectura Hexagonal, DDD pragmático y vertical slices.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); if(p.dependencies && p.dependencies[p.name]) { console.error('ERROR: self-referencing dependency detected. Remove before publish.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.test:all: pnpm install:local && pnpm test:forgeSentinel && pnpm test:forgeSmith

author: Ronald J. Echeverry <ronaldjdev@gmail.com> (https://github.com/ronaldjdev)
